product_overview: Rim-eBay (Eddeyar) is a Next.js marketplace focused on Mauritanian listings allowing anonymous browsing, authenticated listing management, and phone-based registration with OTP verification. It supports advanced location-based search, image-rich annonce pages with maps, and a user dashboard for creating and managing annonces.
core_goals: Allow anonymous visitors to discover and filter annonces with relevant geographic and categorical filters
Enable registered users to create, edit, manage and favorite annonces (including multi-image uploads)
Secure account flows using phone-based registration, OTP verification and JWT session management
Provide a reliable, localized search experience (wilaya / moughataa) and integrated map visualization

features.name: Browse Annonces
features.description: Discover annonces on the home listing with pagination and quick navigation to details.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar -> See a paginated grid of annonce listing cards with image, title, price and location -> Use pagination controls to request page 2 -> See updated listing results for page 2 -> Select a listing to open its detail page at /ar/p/annonces/details/[id]
Navigate to /ar -> Attempt to navigate to a very high page number -> See empty state or server error if backend returns no results

features.name: Search and Filter Annonces
features.description: Apply type, category, location and keyword filters to narrow annonce results.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar -> Select type from the type dropdown -> Select category and subcategory -> Select wilaya -> Select moughataa -> Enter keyword -> Enter price -> Submit search filters -> See filtered annonce results in listing
Navigate to /ar -> Attempt to apply a min/max price range expecting two inputs -> Observe that only a single price input exists and the desired min/max range cannot be applied

features.name: Annonce Detail Page
features.description: View full annonce details including images, description, price, seller contact and map location.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/annonces/details/[id] -> See image carousel and gallery -> Read title, description and price -> See annonce location displayed on the map -> View seller contact information
Navigate to /ar/p/annonces/details/[id] -> Attempt to save the annonce to favorites while not authenticated -> Be redirected to /ar/p/users/connexion to authenticate

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users using phone number and password to establish a JWT session in a secure cookie.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion -> Enter phone number -> Enter password -> Submit login form -> Be redirected to /ar on successful authentication
Navigate to /ar/p/users/connexion -> Enter incorrect phone or password -> Submit login form -> See an error message indicating invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create an account using phone-based registration which triggers OTP verification.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/register -> Enter name -> Enter phone number -> Enter password -> Optionally indicate samsar -> Submit registration form -> Be redirected to /ar/p/verification/otp to verify phone via OTP
Navigate to /ar/p/users/register -> Attempt to register using email expecting an email flow -> Observe that the UI exposes phone registration only and email registration is not available in the UI

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: Confirm phone ownership with a 4-digit OTP sent by SMS, with a resend cooldown.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/verification/otp as part of registration -> Enter 4-digit OTP received by SMS -> Submit OTP -> See success and be redirected to /ar

Navigate directly to /ar/p/verification/otp without prior registration context -> Enter OTP -> Submit OTP -> Experience redirect away or failure due to missing session context and see no explicit OTP error feedback

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request a password reset via registered phone number to receive an OTP for resetting the password.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password -> Enter registered phone number -> Submit request -> Be redirected or instructed to proceed to /ar/p/users/reset-password with OTP
Navigate to /ar/p/users/forgot-password -> Enter phone number and submit -> Observe no visible confirmation or feedback due to the known UI limitation

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Set a new password using the OTP previously sent to the registered phone number.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password -> Enter OTP code received by SMS -> Enter new password -> Confirm new password -> Submit form -> Be redirected to /ar/p/users/connexion on success
Navigate to /ar/p/users/reset-password -> Enter OTP and new passwords -> Submit form -> Receive backend 501 Not Implemented error and fail to reset password

features.name: My Annonces List
features.description: Authenticated dashboard to view and manage the user's own annonces including edit and delete actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/list while authenticated -> See a list of personal annonces with status and pagination -> Select an annonce to edit and navigate to /ar/my/details/[id] -> Delete an annonce with confirmation -> See the annonce removed from the list
Navigate to /ar/my/list while not authenticated -> Be redirected to /ar/p/users/connexion

features.name: Create Annonce Wizard
features.description: Multi-step publishing flow allowing authenticated users to create new annonces with multiple images.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/add while authenticated -> Select annonce type and category -> Enter title, description and price -> Select wilaya and moughataa -> Upload up to 8 images -> Submit to publish -> See confirmation and listing of the new annonce
Navigate to /ar/my/add while authenticated -> Attempt to upload 9 images -> See validation error preventing more than the allowed number of images

features.name: Edit Annonce
features.description: Update existing annonce fields and manage images including upload, delete and reordering.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id] while authenticated -> Modify title, description, price or location -> Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id]/images -> Upload new images or delete existing ones -> Save changes -> See updated annonce details
Navigate to /ar/my/details/[id] while authenticated -> Attempt to save invalid data or perform an unauthorized action -> See validation errors or an authorization error preventing the update

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Allow authenticated users to save annonces to a favorites list and remove them later.
user_flows: Navigate to /ar/p/annonces/details/[id] while authenticated -> Save the annonce to favorites -> Navigate to /ar/my/favorite -> See the annonce listed in favorites -> Remove the annonce from favorites -> See it removed from the favorites list
Navigate to /ar/p/annonces/details/[id] while not authenticated -> Attempt to save the annonce to favorites -> Be redirected to /ar/p/users/connexion to authenticate

routes.description: Home page with annonce listing grid, sidebar filters (desktop) and modal filters (mobile), keyword search
Annonce detail page with image carousel, description, price, location map, contact section
Login page with phone/email and password fields, JWT session creation
Registration page with phone/email, password, samsar checkbox
Forgot password page accepting phone number, triggers OTP via SMS
Reset password page with OTP field and new password fields
OTP verification page after registration or phone login
User dashboard — list of user's own annonces with edit/delete actions
Multi-step wizard to create a new annonce with images
Edit an existing annonce (fields, location, images)
Manage images for an existing annonce (upload, delete, reorder)

features.name: Browse Annonces
features.description: View and paginate annonce listing cards on the home page
user_interactions: View listing cards with image, title, price, and location
Click pagination controls to navigate pages
Click an annonce card to go to detail page

features.name: Search and Filter Annonces
features.description: Filter annonces by type, category, subcategory, wilaya, moughataa, price, and keyword
user_interactions: Select type (Vente / Location / etc.) from dropdown
Click search button to apply filters

features.name: Annonce Detail Page
features.description: View full annonce details including images, description, price, location map, and contact section

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with phone number and password, creates JWT session in HTTP-only cookie
user_interactions: Enter phone number (primary field, tel input)
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register account with phone number, triggers OTP verification via SMS
user_interactions: See validation errors for missing or invalid fields

features.name: OTP Verification
features.description: Verify phone number via OTP code received by SMS after registration or phone login
user_interactions: Enter 4-digit OTP code received by SMS
See success and redirect to home on correct code
See error message on incorrect code
Click resend OTP button (rate limited, 1 min cooldown)

features.name: Forgot Password
features.description: Request password reset via registered phone number, receive OTP by SMS
user_interactions: See confirmation message or error after submission
Redirect to reset password page with OTP field

features.name: Reset Password
features.description: Set new password using OTP received by SMS
user_interactions: Enter OTP code received by SMS
See success and redirect to login on correct OTP

features.name: My Annonces List
features.description: View, manage and delete user's own annonces
user_interactions: View list of personal annonces with status
Click edit button to go to edit page
Click delete button with confirmation dialog

features.name: Create Annonce Wizard
features.description: Multi-step form to publish a new annonce with images
user_interactions: Upload up to 8 images (drag-drop or file picker)

features.name: Edit Annonce
features.description: Edit existing annonce fields and images
user_interactions: Upload new images or delete existing ones

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Save and manage favorite annonces
user_interactions: Click heart icon to remove from favorites

known_limitations.issue: Reset password endpoint returns 501 Not Implemented
known_limitations.impact: The entire password reset flow is broken — users cannot reset their password

known_limitations.issue: OTP verification page redirects away when navigated directly without session context
known_limitations.impact: Tests cannot reliably reach OTP verification; requires prior registration flow state

known_limitations.issue: Login form uses phone number (tel) as primary input, not email
known_limitations.impact: Email-based login tests will fail; the UI only exposes phone login

known_limitations.issue: Registration form only exposes phone registration in the UI; email registration backend exists but is not accessible via UI
known_limitations.impact: Email registration tests cannot pass via UI interaction

known_limitations.issue: OTP error responses from API are not displayed to the user; wrong code silently redirects to home
known_limitations.impact: Users see no feedback on failed OTP submission

known_limitations.issue: Forgot password form gives no visible feedback after submission
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot tell if the request succeeded or failed

known_limitations.issue: Single price input in search filters instead of min/max range
known_limitations.impact: Price range filtering is not fully exposed in the UI
